# API / State Mapping

Map prototype states, data mocks, and user interactions to production data sources or state contracts.

| Prototype state | Production source | Status (`mapped`/`contract_needed`) | Rationale |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `<empty dashboard state>` | `<GET /api/dashboard + EmptyStateViewModel>` | `mapped` | `<how production will render the state>` |

Rules:
- Cover loading, empty, success, error, disabled, and permission states where visible in the prototype.
- Use `contract_needed` only when the production API/state contract does not yet exist and rationale is explicit.
